prestazioni: For the **3.0TFSI (CGWB) supercharged V6**, install a **Vorshlag Motorsport Stage 3+ supercharger pulley kit (72mm, 12-14psi boost)** paired with a **034 Motorsport billet crank pulley** to reduce parasitic drag. Combine with a **CTS Turbo FMIC (front-mount intercooler) with 5.5" thick core** and **Mishimoto silicone charge pipes** to eliminate heat soak under sustained WOT pulls.

Replace the stock **ZF 8HP70 8-speed automatic transmission** with a **DSG Solutions Stage 3 valve body upgrade** and **South Bend Clutch dual-disc organic clutch pack** for the **0B5 7-speed S tronic (for 2.0T models)** to handle 500+ lb-ft of torque. Add a **VF Engineering transmission mount insert** to reduce drivetrain slop under aggressive launches.

For the **4.0TFSI (CEUC) V8 biturbo**, source a **Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (dual ball-bearing, 62mm inducer, 84mm exducer)** with **Precision Turbo wastegates (46mm, dual-port)** and a **custom Xona Rotor 4.0L V8-specific intake manifold** to optimize airflow. Pair with a **Bosch Motorsport 0261S02080 750cc/min port injection kit** and **AEM Infinity 7 ECU** for precise fueling and ignition control.
estetica: Install a **Prior Design PD8XX widebody kit** with **custom carbon fiber fender flares (3.5" extended, bolt-on)** to clear **20x10.5 ET25 BBS CH-R wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (275/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear)**. Use **H&R TRAK+ wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for aggressive stance without fender rubbing.

Replace the stock headlights with **Morimoto XB LED projectors (Bi-Xenon, 5500K)** and **Lux H8 Angel Eyes (RGBW, 1200 lumens)**. Add a **Rieger Tuning RS7-style carbon fiber front lip** and **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser** with **AWE Touring Edition quad exhaust tips (200-cell cats, resonated)** for a stealth OEM+ look.

For the interior, install **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, FIA-approved)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** and a **Momo Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel (350mm, quick-release)**. Add a **RaceLogic VBOX Sport GPS data logger** integrated into the **Audi Virtual Cockpit (retrofitted 12.3" display)** for lap-time tracking and boost monitoring.
